happy.message: You taught me that good code isn't just about being clever — it's about being kind to the next person who reads it. That lesson stuck with me. So did you!

sad.message: Every code review is going to feel a little quieter without your comments. Thank you for everything you taught this team.

miserable.message: If today's a tough one, just know the impact you made here is permanent. Take it easy on yourself — you've earned it.
